title: Location not populating
excerpt:
I am having an issue with one of my member users.  When they try to enter a location in a column, they cannot search or enter anything.  None of the other users have this issue.  Anyone know of a fix? 
Thanks.

posts.author: JHolden1975 (Jason Holden)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having an issue with one of my member users. When they try to enter a location in a column, they cannot search or enter anything. None of the other users have this issue. Anyone know of a fix?

Thanks.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Same browser type? I’d also have them try clearing cookies/cache

posts.author: JHolden1975 (Jason Holden)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Desiree. While online with my teammate, the location column did start populating. I will have him clear his cache and check his browser if the problem persists though. Thank you for the reply…
